title: Develop sustainable agricultural practices that utilise renewable energy and recycling systems
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Develop sustainable agricultural practices that utilise renewable energy and recycling systems demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Identify opportunities to use renewable energy

pcs.text: Identify areas of enterprise where renewable energy, recycling products or improving work practices could be utilised to reduce greenhouse gas emissions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify areas of enterprise where renewable energy, recycling products or improving work practices could be utilised to reduce greenhouse gas emissions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify areas of enterprise where renewable energy, recycling products or improving work practices could be utilised to reduce greenhouse gas emissions.

pcs.text: Identify available government subsidies for the implementation of strategies using renewable energy or recycling and potential cost savings to the business in the longer term
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify available government subsidies for the implementation of strategies using renewable energy or recycling and potential cost savings to the business in the longer term?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify available government subsidies for the implementation of strategies using renewable energy or recycling and potential cost savings to the business in the longer term.

pcs.text: Identify the specified standards of quality, licensing, regulatory requirements, government legislation and safety issues for the introduction of any renewable energy resources and recycled products
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the specified standards of quality, licensing, regulatory requirements, government legislation and safety issues for the introduction of any renewable energy resources and recycled products?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the specified standards of quality, licensing, regulatory requirements, government legislation and safety issues for the introduction of any renewable energy resources and recycled products.

pcs.text: Identify potential income generated by on selling energy excesses or recycled products
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential income generated by on selling energy excesses or recycled products?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential income generated by on selling energy excesses or recycled products.

pcs.text: Measure improvement outcomes from the introduction of renewable energy sources and recycling products in relation to achieving greater sustainability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Measure improvement outcomes from the introduction of renewable energy sources and recycling products in relation to achieving greater sustainability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Measure improvement outcomes from the introduction of renewable energy sources and recycling products in relation to achieving greater sustainability.

pcs.text: Conduct risk assessment for work health and safety hazards associated with renewable energy and recycling initiatives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct risk assessment for work health and safety hazards associated with renewable energy and recycling initiatives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct risk assessment for work health and safety hazards associated with renewable energy and recycling initiatives.
